title: Control Record
description: Defines a governance control, technical guardrail, or operational process designed to mitigate AI risks.

id.description: Unique identifier of the control (e.g. ctl_1234).

title.description: Short title or name of the governance control (e.g. data_anonymization, bias_monitoring).

description.description: Detailed description of how the control operates and is verified.

category.description: The nature of the defensive control.

mitigated_risk_ids.description: List of risk identifiers this control directly maps to and mitigates (references rsk_1234).

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the control.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the control record was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the control record was last updated.

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs for metadata extensions.
